title: hieracium cordatum subsp. praecordatum
intro: Hieracium cordatum subsp. praecordatum, also known as a subspecies of the lesser hawk's beard plant, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion genus. It possesses medicinal properties, traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Hieracium cordatum subsp. praecordatum include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic agent, making it a potential remedy for wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the leaves and flowers, then infusing them in hot water or oil to create a medicinal tea or tincture.
